gtalike_teleport.config.title: Grand Teleport Settings
gtalike_teleport.config.description: Adjust camera heights used by the zoom stages.
gtalike_teleport.config.linked.tooltip: Use the same three heights for zoom-out and zoom-in.
gtalike_teleport.config.unlinked.tooltip: Edit zoom-out and zoom-in heights separately.
gtalike_teleport.config.layout_debug.too: Drag each layout item to move it. Drag the right edge, bottom edge, or corner to resize it.
gtalike_teleport.config.layout_aspect.to: Keep the selected item aspect ratio when resizing from the corner.
gtalike_teleport.config.layout_size_rese: Restore the selected item size and aspect ratio while keeping its position as much as possible.
gtalike_teleport.config.layout_values.to: Enter relative x y w h values and apply them to the selected item.
gtalike_teleport.config.layout_grid.tool: Show layout grid guides and center lines while editing the layout.
gtalike_teleport.config.layout_snap.tool: Snap dragged items to the grid, center lines, and other item edges.
gtalike_teleport.config.layout_debug_hin: Layout edit: drag items to move / drag edges to resize / edit selected text in the text box
gtalike_teleport.config.general.title: General Settings
gtalike_teleport.config.general.desc: Configure the core mod behavior and visual styles.
gtalike_teleport.config.sounds.title: Sound Settings
gtalike_teleport.config.sounds.desc: Configure volumes and custom GTA V sound pack.
gtalike_teleport.config.others.title: Integration Settings
gtalike_teleport.config.others.desc: Configure cinematic transitions for other mods.
gtalike_teleport.tooltip.effect: Enable or disable the GTA V cinematic camera transition effect.
gtalike_teleport.tooltip.movement: Allow players to walk and look around during transitions.
gtalike_teleport.tooltip.cross_dimension: Enable transitions when teleporting across different dimensions.
gtalike_teleport.tooltip.preset: Select transition profile speed (Classic, Fast, Slow).
gtalike_teleport.tooltip.shutter_flash: Add camera shutter screen flashes between zooms.
gtalike_teleport.tooltip.vignette: Apply a soft dark vignette around the screen borders in-flight.
gtalike_teleport.tooltip.interference: Display television static and CRT scanline interference.
gtalike_teleport.tooltip.fade_color: Select overlay color used for the final camera landing impact.
gtalike_teleport.tooltip.warp_plate: Enable transition animations for Waystones Warp Plates.
gtalike_teleport.tooltip.external_telepo: Enable transition animations for third-party mod teleports.
gtalike_teleport.tooltip.vanilla_tp: Enable transitions when using the vanilla Minecraft /tp command.
gtalike_teleport.tooltip.journeymap: Enable transitions when teleporting on JourneyMap screens.
gtalike_teleport.tooltip.portals: Enable transition effects when entering Nether or End portals.
gtalike_teleport.tooltip.fallback_chunk_: Fade ground chunks to prevent rendering cuts during zoom-out.
gtalike_teleport.tooltip.sound_pack: Select between Real GTA V sounds, default mod sounds, or Minecraft sounds only (OFF).
gtalike_teleport.tooltip.minecraft_volum: Set game default sound volume during teleportation.
gtalike_teleport.tooltip.custom_volume: Set custom/GTA sound volume during teleportation.
